name: pagoda
description: Target-agnostic validation framework for agentic software.

scripts.build: yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-core build && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-adapter-sdk build && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-runner build && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-cli build && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-target-demo-agent build
scripts.test:workspaces: yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-core test:unit && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-adapter-sdk test:unit && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-runner test:unit && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-cli test:unit && yarn workspace @petitbon/pagoda-target-demo-agent test:unit
